items.title: OpenAI Open-Sources Symphony, a SPEC.md for Autonomous Coding Agent Orchestration
items.summaryShort: OpenAI Open-Sources Symphony, a SPEC.md for Autonomous Coding Agent Orchestration. OpenAI Symphony is an agent orchestrator that uses project-management tools, like issue trackers, as a control plan to coordinate multiple coding agents.

items.title: Neobank Monzo Builds Governed Data Mesh Across 100 Teams and 12000 dbt Models
items.summaryShort: Neobank Monzo Builds Governed Data Mesh Across 100 Teams and 12000 dbt Models. Monzo recently redesigned its data warehouse to support more than 100 teams working on over 12000 dbt models.

items.title: Ubuntu Embraces Local AI Instead of Cloud-First OS Integration
items.summaryShort: Ubuntu Embraces Local AI Instead of Cloud-First OS Integration. Ubuntu has outlined its AI strategy, describing it as a deliberate departure from industry trends towards cloud-centric, AI-first operating systems.

items.title: Google Introduces Cloud Fraud Defense as Successor to reCAPTCHA
items.summaryShort: Google Introduces Cloud Fraud Defense as Successor to reCAPTCHA. At the recent Next ‘26 conference, Google introduced Google Cloud Fraud Defense, the successor to reCAPTCHA.

items.title: Microsoft Releases Aspire 13.3 with Major Deployment and Frontend Updates
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Releases Aspire 13.3 with Major Deployment and Frontend Updates. Microsoft has released Aspire 13.3, introducing a new aspire destroy command for tearing down deployments across Azure, Kubernetes, and Compose.

items.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
items.summaryShort: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats. Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

items.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
items.summaryShort: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial. A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

items.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
items.summaryShort: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI. It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.
